summary: Frontend refinement patch testing completed. All 13 features tested - 12 PASS, 1 INFO (Comparable Cases section not visible in BarristerView - likely no similar_cases data in grounds). All refined components verified: VerificationBadge with coloured borders (red for unverified), EvidenceSummary with file references, CaseStrengthMeter with renamed breakdown labels, BarristerView with ground_type labels, Law Sections, Verification and Review Status section.

integration_issues.issue: Comparable Cases section not visible in BarristerGroundBlock - likely because grounds don't have similar_cases data populated
integration_issues.note: Component code exists and is correct, but no data to display

critical_code_review_comments: VerificationBadge.jsx: Correctly implements coloured borders - green (verified), blue (reviewed), yellow (draft), red (unverified)
EvidenceSummary.jsx: Correctly shows page_reference, chunk_reference, verification_status per evidence item
CaseStrengthMeter.jsx: Correctly shows 'Appeal Preparation Readiness' heading and renamed breakdown labels

BarristerView.jsx: Correctly shows BarristerGroundBlock with StrengthBadge, VerificationBadge, LegitimacyPanel, EvidenceSummary (expanded), Law Sections, ground_type label, 'requires human review' warning
BarristerView.jsx: Correctly shows 'Verification and Review Status' section with counts for grounds requiring review, unverified, and verified
BarristerView.jsx: AI footer text present at bottom

success_rate.frontend: 92% (12/13 features verified, 1 component has no data)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refinement patch verified. All 4 refined files working correctly. BarristerView route is /cases/{caseId}/reports/{reportId}/barrister. The barrister_view report_id for case_87ef925be713 is rpt_87efc2a25f4d.
